Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Luis Serrano, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP (310) 933-4271 lserrano@quillarrowlaw.com
Attorney for Plaintiffs, EDUARDO D. CERNA VANESSA CERNA for Plaintiff.
Austin Abernathy, Esq. ERSKINE LAW, APC (949) 777-6032 aabernathy@erskinelaw.com Attorney for Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication.

The court treats General Motors LLC's motion for summary judgment as a motion for judgment on the pleadings and grants with 15 days leave to amend. (see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Set For Trial On Sep-02-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
